examples: Methods To aggregate analyse the clinical symptoms, signs, the changes of arterial blood gas and lung imaging and so on of 19 acute phosgene poisoning patients.
It is suggested to develop industry of the fine chemicals concerned with some superior raw materials in Hunan province, such as toluene, phosgene and citric acid.
Conclusion: acute phosgene poisoning cause acute lung injury principally, it can be healed in short time by combination treatment mainly included glucocorticosteroid.
